history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A 3D anime-style character, a young man with long, flowing silver hair and sharp features, stands in a dynamic pose, his right arm extended forward. He wears an ornate, dark armor with intricate gold detailing, featuring shoulder pauldrons and chest armor with swirling, almost tribal patterns. The armor has a regal and battle-ready appearance.

Floating around the character are three prominent app icons:
1.  A black circle with the white TikTok logo.
2.  A black square with a glowing green swirling symbol, representing the Alight Motion app.
3.  A white square with a black stylized "X" or scissors-like symbol, representing the CapCut app.

The background is a gradient of dark blue to a slightly lighter blue, suggesting a twilight or night sky with a subtle hint of clouds or atmospheric haze. The lighting is dramatic, with highlights on the character's armor and hair, creating a sense of depth and fantasy. The overall mood is epic and modern, blending fantasy aesthetics with digital/social media elements. The style is reminiscent of high-quality 3D animation found in popular anime series or video games.
